stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Regarding the altimeter display shown in the annex, the input pressure source is...

options.a: calculated within the instrument, in analogue form, by subtracting static pressure from pitot pressure.
options.b: static, and it is converted into a digital signal by a transducer.
options.c: static, and it is transmitted from the source to the instrument through a pipeline.
options.d: calculated by the Air Data Computer by subtracting static pressure from pitot pressure.
